title: t0gp smp+
description: a mod pack aimed at optimizing the game, improving the game play in single player and access to my server
body:
a mod pack aimed at optimizing the game, improving the game play in single player and access to my server

# advantages of this modpack:

1. allows you to comfortably play both with a steam deck (using t0gp smp+ 4.6.0-sd) and with others personal computers (using t0gp smp+ 4.6.0-pc)
2. gives access to my server
3. optimizes the game - uses Sodium and other mods to get better performance
4. allows you to improve the quality of graphics with shader sets and mods that can be customized and enabled at your discretion
5. uses a set of mods based on Fabric to replace OptiFine functions
6. is open to suggestions - users can suggest their changes to improve the modpack
7. adds the ability to enable a dark theme to improve the interface
8. improves the security of the game with No Chat Reports and No Telemetry
